name: cn-academic-spark
description: CN-Academic-Spark: a Claude skill bundle for Chinese academic reporting. Includes a PPT engine (Generate editable and reusable .pptx files with presentation slides) and a TechnicalRoute engine (Academic Technology Roadmap Generator).

plugins.name: cn-academic-spark
plugins.description: A reusable Claude-oriented academic skill collection for Chinese academic reporting. Ships two cooperating skills: a PPT engine for full editable Chinese-academic .pptx generation and a TechnicalRoute engine for single contract-first academic infographics (thinking / method / workflow archetypes, literature style retrieval).
